title: Elemental Gear
description: Mod introducing elemental tools and more in future!
body:
This is my mod which will expand over time to introduce gear, tools, mobs and more.
It is very much a learning process so no guarantees over content over any timeframe!
Please be aware this is a pre release and will be updated more often on my github if you'd like to compile yourself.

[Github](https://github.com/mars455/lightning-mod)
# Current Content

Lightning Resources [Lightning Dust, Lightning Ingot, Lightning Dust Block, Lightning Sword + Armour]

Elemental Dust (The base crafting resource)

Lava Resources [Lava Gemstone Sword]

# Planned Content

Completing Lightning Resources [Tools, wood + stone sets, decoration blocks, complete functionality]

Completing Lava Resources [Same as above]

Adding Air Resources

Adding Water Resources

Adding Earth Resources

Adding Fire Resources

Adding Plant Resources

Adding Ice Resources

_Each is planned to have different effects :)_
